title: Optimal Survival
description: Optimal Survival enhances Minecraft with better performance, stunning visuals, immersive sounds, and smart quality-of-life upgrades—offering a smooth, engaging survival experience.
body:
# 🚀 Optimal Survival Modpack – The Ultimate Minecraft Experience

![Optimal Survival Banner](https://cdna.artstation.com/p/assets/images/images/042/400/684/large/mariana-salimena-swamp-artstation.jpg?1634406914)
Credit : Mariana Salimena

**Optimal Survival** is a modpack built for players who want the best of Minecraft: better performance, a modern interface, immersive visuals, and an enhanced survival experience — all while staying true to vanilla.

Enjoy smooth gameplay, realistic sounds, dynamic animations, and tons of quality-of-life improvements. Whether you're an explorer, builder, or redstone enthusiast, this pack balances lightness and depth for every playstyle.

## 🌟 Key Features

- **🚀 Optimized Performance** – Carefully selected mods to boost FPS and reduce lag.
- **🎨 Enhanced Visuals & UI** – Better particles, smooth animations, customizable HUD.
- **🎵 Immersive Audio** – Realistic environmental sounds that bring the world to life.
- **⚙️ Smart QoL Tweaks** – Pickup notifications, simplified inventory, F3 overhaul, and more.
- **🔧 Open & Community-Driven** – Actively maintained with regular updates and feedback.

## 📥 Installation

1. 🚀 Open your favorite launcher (e.g. Prism).
2. 🔍 Create a new instance and find **Optimal Survival** on the [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimal-survival).
3. ⬇️ Download and install the pack.
4. 🎮 Launch Minecraft and start your optimized adventure!
5. 💡 Need help? Check the [Modrinth Documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth).

## 🤝 Need help or have suggestions?
DM me on Discord: **cacahouetes69**

🔥 Dive into Optimal Survival – a fresh way to (re)discover Minecraft!
